summary: Iteration 24 testing complete. All 20 backend tests passed for advanced geofencing features (zones with BLE shape, events, alerts, detection, trigger). All frontend features verified: 3 tabs (Zones/Événements/Alertes), KPI cards, router/assets toggles, zone creation modal with 3 shapes (Cercle/Polygone/Router BLE), 3 modes (Entrée/Sortie/Entrée+Sortie), BLE-specific controls (Router dropdown, RSSI slider, Anti-bruit slider, Lissage slider).
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/zones - creates BLE zone with shape=ble, mode=entry, rssi_threshold=-65
Backend: POST /api/zones - creates zone with mode=exit
Backend: POST /api/zones - creates zone with mode=both
Backend: GET /api/zones/events - returns 200 (NOT 404, route ordering fixed)
Backend: GET /api/zones/events/stats - returns entries/exits/ble_detected/recent_24h/most_active_zones
Backend: POST /api/zones/events - creates zone event with timestamp
Backend: GET /api/zones/events?event_type=... - filtering works
Backend: POST /api/zones/detect - detects asset in GPS circle zone
Backend: POST /api/zones/detect - correctly excludes asset outside zone
Backend: POST /api/zones/trigger - triggers zone event
Backend: POST /api/zones/trigger - respects zone mode (entry-only skips exit events)
Backend: POST /api/zones/trigger - returns 404 for non-existent zone
Backend: GET /api/zones/alerts - returns 200 and list
Backend: POST /api/zones/alerts - creates alert rule with cooldown_minutes
Backend: DELETE /api/zones/alerts/{id} - deletes alert
Backend: DELETE /api/zones/alerts/{id} - returns 404 for non-existent alert
Backend: Route ordering verified - /zones/events, /zones/events/stats, /zones/detect, /zones/alerts all return 200
Frontend: Zones page has 3 tabs (Zones, Événements, Alertes)
Frontend: Events tab shows 5 KPI cards (Entrées, Sorties, Non détectés, Détections BLE, Dernières 24h)
Frontend: Events tab shows 'Zones les plus actives' and event timeline
Frontend: Alerts tab shows configured alerts with 'Nouvelle alerte' button
Frontend: Zone creation modal has 3 shape options (Cercle, Polygone, Router BLE)
Frontend: Mode selector has 3 options (Entrée, Sortie, Entrée + Sortie)
Frontend: BLE shape shows Router Associé dropdown, RSSI slider, Anti-bruit slider, Lissage slider
Frontend: Router/Assets toggles visible on map
Frontend: Zone list shows existing zones with type/mode badges
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: Route ordering correctly places static routes (/zones/events, /zones/events/stats, /zones/detect, /zones/trigger, /zones/alerts) BEFORE parametric /zones/{zone_id}
server.py: ZoneCreate model includes all BLE fields (rssi_threshold, debounce_seconds, rssi_smoothing, router_id, router_name)
server.py: detect_asset_in_zone() implements RSSI smoothing by averaging recent readings
server.py: trigger_zone_event() respects zone mode (entry/exit/both) and checks alert cooldown
PremiumZones.jsx: Well-structured with 3 tabs, proper API integration for events/alerts
PremiumZones.jsx: BLE-specific form fields conditionally rendered when shape='ble'
PremiumZones.jsx: Mode selector with 3 options properly updates editForm.mode
PremiumZones.jsx: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Test zones and events created during pytest (cleaned up after tests). Existing data: 'Zone Test Cercle', 'Zone Router BLE-01', 1 alert rule
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 advanced geofencing fully tested. Key endpoints: POST/GET /api/zones, GET /api/zones/events, GET /api/zones/events/stats, POST /api/zones/events, POST /api/zones/detect, POST /api/zones/trigger, GET/POST/DELETE /api/zones/alerts. Frontend data-testids: zones-title, zones-tabs, tab-zones, tab-events, tab-alerts, zones-stats, zones-map, toggle-routers, toggle-assets, zones-add-btn, zone-shape-selector, shape-circle-btn, shape-polygon-btn, shape-ble-btn, zone-mode-selector, mode-entry-btn, mode-exit-btn, mode-both-btn, zone-router-select, zone-rssi-slider, zone-debounce-slider, zone-smoothing-slider, zone-save-btn, add-alert-btn, alert-modal.

zones_ble_shape.details: BLE zones with router_id, rssi_threshold, debounce_seconds, rssi_smoothing

zones_detection_modes.details: entry, exit, both modes properly filter events in trigger endpoint

zone_events_api.details: GET /api/zones/events returns 200 (route ordering fixed), stats endpoint returns all KPIs

zone_detection.details: GPS circle detection with haversine distance, RSSI smoothing for BLE

zone_alerts.details: CRUD for alerts with cooldown_minutes, channels, enabled flag

frontend_ble_controls.details: Router dropdown, RSSI slider, Anti-bruit slider, Lissage slider visible when BLE selected
